formDescriptions.basic: enter the organization name and basic settings
formDescriptions.authConfig: configure how users will authenticate to this organization
formDescriptions.accessPolicy: define how roles and permissions are applied in this organization
formDescriptions.review: review and confirm all details before saving

hints.enabled: when disabled, users cannot access this organization
hints.issuerUrl: the OpenID Connect issuer URL for your Keycloak realm
hints.clientId: the client ID registered in Keycloak for this organization

messages.allFieldsRequired: all fields marked with * are required
messages.completeAllSteps: complete all steps to create a new customer
messages.reviewCreateSummary: all information has been validated. Please review and confirm to create the customer.
messages.reviewEditSummary: review the changes before updating the customer.

notifications.alreadyExists: a customer with this name already exists
notifications.forbidden: you don't have permission to perform this action

validation.nameMinLength: name must be at least 3 characters
validation.issuerUrlRequired: issuer URL is required for Keycloak authentication
validation.clientIdRequired: client ID is required for Keycloak authentication
